channel.title: CleanTech Sample Wire
channel.description: Hand-written sample fixture; not a real publication.

item.title: ABC GW-200 heat pump posts COP 3.4 at -20C in independent testing
item.description: Independent lab results submitted to the NEEP database show ABC's new GW-200 cold-climate heat pump sustaining a COP of 3.4 at -20C, beating every unit in its class.
item.activist:hint: challenges=heat-pump-top-pick; claim=ABC's new GW-200 just posted a COP of 3.4 at -20C in independent NEEP testing; subject=ABC's GW-200; new_stance=ABC's GW-200 is the best cold-climate heat pump for most homes

item.title: Used EV prices fall 22% year over year as off-lease supply surges
item.description: A flood of three-year-old electric vehicles coming off lease has pushed used EV prices down 22% year over year, while battery health reports stay strong.
item.activist:hint: supports=used-ev-value; claim=off-lease supply just pushed used EV prices down 22% year over year while battery health held

item.title: Quarterly results: turbine maker beats expectations
item.description: Strong quarterly earnings from a major wind turbine manufacturer on utility-scale orders.
